hero.headline: Your Home Away From Home in Sylhet

features.title: Prime Location
features.description: Minutes away from SUST, Leading University, and Metropolitan University.

features.title: All-Inclusive Rent
features.description: No hidden costs. WiFi, water, electricity, and maintenance included.

features.title: Safe & Secure
features.description: CCTV cameras, security guards, and biometric access control.

features.title: Community Events
features.description: Study groups, cultural events, and social activities every month.

faq.question: What is included in the rent?
faq.answer: Rent includes WiFi, water, electricity, maintenance, and access to all common facilities (study lounge, gym, entertainment room). Meals are available at an additional cost.

faq.question: Can I book a room before arriving in Sylhet?
faq.answer: Yes! You can book online through our website. We also offer virtual tours for prospective residents who are not in Sylhet yet.

faq.question: Is there any security deposit?
faq.answer: Yes, a refundable security deposit equal to one month's rent is required at the time of booking.

faq.question: Can I switch rooms if I don't like mine?
faq.answer: Subject to availability, you can request a room change after the first month. A small administrative fee may apply.

faq.question: Are visitors allowed?
faq.answer: Visitors are allowed during daytime hours (8 AM - 8 PM) with prior registration at the front desk. Overnight guests are not permitted.
